Invalid option `--help'

Usage: db-synthesizer --config FILE --db PATH 
                      [--shelley-operational-certificate FILE] 
                      [--shelley-vrf-key FILE] [--shelley-kes-key FILE] 
                      [--bulk-credentials-file FILE] 
                      ((-s|--slots NUMBER) | (-b|--blocks NUMBER) | 
                        (-e|--epochs NUMBER)) [-f | -a]
